instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Buy Life Insurance This Diwali and Secure the Lives of Your Loved Ones
Come October 24th and everyone would be celebrating Diwali, the festival of lights. Diwali is the festival of lights and new beginnings. It is probably one of the biggest festivals in India, cutting across castes, creeds and religions. It is the time when people come together forgetting their personal and cultural differences. Every year, Diwali symbolises banishing the darkness with light. While people decorate their homes and light them up with diyas and lamps, how about lighting up the lives of your loved ones?
Diwali is also the time for gifting. But such Diwali gifts give temporary happiness. What about giving your family long-lasting happiness in the form of security?
Life insurance and Diwali
Life insurance plans can go a long way in securing the financial future of your loved ones. It can give them financial security in your absence and ensure that lead a comfortable life. That is why buying a life insurance policy this Diwali can be the ideal gift that you can give your loved ones.
How does life insurance secures the lives of your loved ones?
Wondering how life insurance secures the lives of your loved ones? Here are the ways –
Term insurance and financial security
When talking about financial security, the first thing that jumps to mind is a term insurance policy. The plan covers the risk of premature death, at affordable premiums. Thus, if you are the breadwinner for your family, you can insure your life under a term plan. The low premiums allow you to opt for an adequate sum assured so that your family’s financial needs are optimally met. You can use the life insurance calculator to find the optimal coverage level and opt for it.
After you buy a term insurance policy, you can give security to your family. In the event of your untimely passing, your family would get the sum assured. This benefit would help them meet their financial loss and live a comfortable life.
Wouldn’t you want that?
Child plans for your child’s future
This is for parents who dream of providing the ideal future for their children. Have you ever wondered what your child’s future look like if you are not around?
While you might toil day in and day out and save for your child’s future, the saving would be affected in case of your premature demise. That is why you need to make a corpus that remains unaffected even when you are not around.
This is where child plans fit into the picture. Child plans have a premium waiver benefit that waives off the premium if the parent passes away. However, the plan continues unaffected throughout the tenure and pays a maturity benefit. Thus, with a child plan, the savings don’t stop even in your absence making them a secure choice for your child’s future.
Saving plans for your financial goals
Your family might have different financial goals, like buying a house or a car, going for an international vacation, saving for buying a home appliance and the like. While you might save for these goals, an untimely demise might throw a spoke in your savings wheel. That is why you can opt for savings plans, like endowment, money back and ULIPs, to create a secured corpus for your goals. While these plans would allow you to save up over the life insurance policy tenure, they also promise a death benefit in the case of unfortunate emergencies.
So, with savings-oriented life insurance plans, you can save for your and your family’s financial goals and ensure that the goals are fulfilled whether you are around or not.
Health plans for medical emergencies
Lastly, you cannot avoid medical emergencies springing up when you least expect them to. These emergencies can wipe out your savings given the expensive medical treatments in current times. You, thus, need a health insurance policy to cover your medical expenses and give you financial assistance in times of uncertainty. The health plans offered by life insurance companies give you a lump sum benefit in critical illnesses and help you deal with the financial implications. What’s more, they also earn you a tax benefit under Section 80D1 of the Income Tax Act, 1961.
With a health plan in place, you can afford the ideal treatments for you and your loved ones should an emergency arise.
With the different types of life insurance plans and their different applications, you can give your loved ones the financial protection that they deserve. Whether it is providing financial security, creating a corpus for your child’s future, saving for your financial goals or meeting the financial demands of a medical emergency, life insurance plans come to your rescue.
So, this Diwali, make your celebrations more meaningful. Invest in the different types of life insurance plans as Diwali gifts and give security to your whole family. Choose from the different insurance policies depending on your needs. Use the life insurance calculator to get adequate coverage and build up an insurance portfolio that caters to every need and every goal.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789
Tax benefits as per prevailing Income tax laws shall apply. Please check with your tax consultant for eligibility
Reference
https://cleartax.in/s/medical-insurance
